## ✅ Pre-Submission Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [code style guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have reviewed my own diff and removed debug logs, leftover comments, and test code
- [ ] I have NOT committed any `.env`, secrets, or API keys
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation (README, `.env.example`, etc.) if needed
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main` (`git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main`)
- [ ] I have run `npm install` and ensured no broken dependencies
- [ ] The PR title follows conventional commit format (e.g., `feat(frontend): add doctor rating`)
